Clean Formulations Cleaner Ingredients Aluminium Free Paraben Free Alcohol Free Mineral Oil Free Essential Oil Free Synthetic Dyes Free Q. Will the serum leave a stain on my clothes? A. No. The underarm roll-on will not leave any stain on the clothes. Q. Can I use it on shaved or waxed skin? A. It is recommended not to use it on freshly shaved or waxed skin. Take a break of 3 to 4 days to allow your underarm skin to heal from all the tug & pull that has happened during waxing or shaving. Also, if your underarm skin is already damaged or irritated, avoid using this product. Q. Will it also treat underarm concerns caused by hormonal issues? A. No. The product has not been formulated to treat underarm concerns caused by hormonal issues. In this regard, we recommend consulting an expert to get a proper solution for the same. Q. However, it works effectively to deodorise underarms & keep them fresh for hours. Q. Will it completely stop underarm sweating? A. No. The underarm roll-on helps check excess sweating & odour caused by the same with 4% AHA + BHA. It's aluminium-free which means it will not clog the pores of your underarm skin. Softens dry, chapped lips with deep moisturization. Checks lip tanning & provides UVA+UVB protection. Lightweight & non-sticky, it restores natural lip colour with a glossy finish. Deep Moisturization Visibly Plumps Tinted All Skin Tones cherry-lip-balm Tried. Tested. Dry, Chapped Lips Lip Pigmentation Lip Tanning UV Damage Mauve Pink Tint VITAMIN C Antioxidant-rich, fades lip pigmentation to resurface natural lip color SHEA BUTTER Deeply moisturizes & locks it in for softer lips VITAMIN E Boosts regeneration of new cells for healed & healthy lips UV FILTERS Blocks UVA+UVB rays while reducing lip tanning Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Octocrylene, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Hydrogenated Soy Polyglycerides (and) C15-23 Alkanes, Sorbitan Olivate, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Color, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Seed Butter, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride (and) Polyurethane-79, Flavour, Pentaerythrityl Tetra-Di-T-Butyl Hydroxyhydrocinnamate, Sucralose. Squeeze out a small amount Apply evenly on your lips Re-apply as and when needed Layering With Other Products Clean Formulations Cleaner Ingredients Mineral Oil Free Essential Oil Free Paraben Free GMO Free Silicone Free Light weight Q. Why Vitamin C+E in a lip balm? A. The skin of our lips is the thinnest, thus making them prone to dryness, flakiness, damage & pigmentation. The synergistic blend of vitamin C+E makes it the ultimate antidote for dry, chapped & pigmented lips. While vitamin C treats dark, pigmented lips to reveal natural pink lips, vitamin E moisturises & heals chapped lips to resurface smooth, healthy lips. Q. Why SPF 30 in a lip balm? A. Our Gloss Boss Lip Balm comes with SPF 30 to protect the lips from damage caused by the sun. It also prevents lip tanning, thereby providing daily sun protection with non-stop shine. Q. Can expecting & breastfeeding mothers use this product? A. Our product is 100% vegan & is free of nasties like petrolatum, paraben sulphate, alcohol & synthetic fragrance. However, we recommend you consult a health expert before starting to use the product. Q. What Age Group Can Use This Lip Balm? A. You can use this lip balm if you are 15 or above. Q. Does the product contain mineral oil? A. No. Our Gloss Boss Lip Balm is free of mineral oils or any form or allergen that may cause irritation to the skin. Q. Does the scent of the lip balm change over time? A. We've only used natural fruit flavours in our lip balms & it is free of synthetic fragrance. Therefore, the natural scent may wither away over time but it does not affect the efficacy of the product. Q. What’s different about the new Gloss Boss Lip Balm? A. Our Gloss Boss Lip Balm comes with the benefits of both lip balm and makeup. It is curated to nourish & moisturise your lips for long hours just like a lip balm while leaving your lips with a flush of fresh, fruity colour & shine like a lip gloss. Q. Does this leave a sticky residue? A. No! Our lip balm comes with a smooth, buttery texture that feels light and non-sticky on the lips. Q. How often should I use this glossy balm? A. Use this glossy lip balm every day, as and when desired for soft, smooth, plump and healthy lips. Q. What do the lip balms smell like? A. Once you apply the lip balms, it smells fresh and fruity with a texture that melts on the lips for long-lasting moisture. Q. What are the benefits of shea butter in lip balms? A. The indulgent shea butter in this 100% vegan glossy lip balm not only moisturises dry & flaky lips but also locks in moisture & heals flakiness for smooth, plump & plush lips. Q. Which are the max tinted lip balms of all the five lip balms? A. Strawberry crush & watermelon rush has the maximum tint followed by Cherry Pop with medium tint, Cocoa Mint with low tint & Mango Passion with no tint. Q. Does this plump or just moisturise the lips? A. Gloss Boss lip balm comes with a super nourishing formula which not only moisturises the lips but also softens, smoothens & plumps lips while treating pigmentation. Q. Is there beeswax in the lip balm? Nope! This glossy lip balm is 100% Vegan & does not contain any beeswax. Suggested Rituals

Yes, this toner works perfectly on clogged skin and is effective in unclogging pores. It is an AHA infused face toner that also treats imbalanced pH, dehydration, and uneven skin tone. Is niacinamide good in toner? Niacinamide toner usually has a high concentration of Vitamin B3. Does niacinamide toner help clear pores? Because niacinamide is also an anti-inflammatory, it can help unclog pores and reduce blemishes. Should you use moisturizer after niacinamide toner? Because most niacinamide serums are water-based, they should be used after cleansing and toning but before applying any oil-based serums or moisturizers. You can assure maximum absorption and effectiveness this way. Our 10% Niacinamide serum has been curated to control excess oil with 2x efficacy. It restores pore functioning, soothes skin & improves overall skin texture. Q. Is 10% Niacinamide+Cica serum suitable for sensitive skin? A. Yes! Suggest me a routine with this serum & other Dot & Key Products? A. Can I use niacinamide and vitamin C together? A. Yes, niacinamide and vitamin C can be used together. In fact, when used together, both provide brilliant results for fading the look of sun-induced discolourations. However, make sure to follow it up with sunscreen before going out in the sun. Q. Can I use Niacinamide 20% Treatment with other products containing niacinamide? A. Yes, you can use the 10% Niacinamide+Cica Serum with other niacinamide products. It can be a toner, a face cream and even a sunscreen, layering them in order from thinnest to thickest texture. Q. Can niacinamide cause sensitivity, redness or irritation? A. Niacinamide typically doesn’t cause redness, sensitivity or irritation. However, some people may experience brief flushing when pure niacinamide and vitamin C are used together. This combination can convert niacinamide to niacin, which may trigger temporary redness. However, if this continues, you may discontinue using these two activies together & choose to use them in separate routines. Q. Can I use this every day? A. Yes, you can safely use this serum every day. Our serum is free of harmful chemicals and irritants as we aim to provide you best results backed by clean ingredients & cleaner formulations. Applying this serum every day daily will provide the most consistent results. Q. Is this serum better for morning or night? A. For best results, you can use niacinamide in the morning and at night. You can also alternate its use if you find that works better for you. Q. What I cannot mix with niacinamide? A. While there are a lot of myths and misinformation about which ingredients you supposedly can’t mix with niacinamide, research shows that you can use niacinamide with retinol, vitamin C, hydroxy acids and other skin care ingredients safely. Q. Is 10% niacinamide too strong? A. While 10% niacinamide is potent, it is a concentration that's safe to use. However, it may react differently on different skin. Therefore, we recommend patch testing first, and incorporating it slowly into your routine, watching how your skin responds. Q. Can I use this serum around the eyes? A. No! We recommend leaving the eye area and using the serum for the rest of the face & neck.
